items.textSample: FAQ section
Q. What is this FAQ Toggle?
It's a special script for Carrd. It automatically transforms your list of questions and answers into a clean, interactive "accordion" (where answers smoothly appear when you click
Q. How do I format my content?
It's simple. You must wrap the entire block in a class="FAQContainer". Then, insert a divider-component before each question (your H1-H3 heading) and after each answer (your text/n
It's simple. You must wrap the entire block in a class="FAQContainer". Then, insert a divider-component before each question (your H1-H3 heading) and after each answer (your text/n
Q. How do I add the script to my Carrd site?
You can use the CDN method. Add one Embed (Style: Hidden) element to the Head section for the CSS file. Then, add a second Embed (Style: Hidden) element to the Body End section for
